shipping.summary: Item Total Under $100 USD Over $100 USD Domestic Standard $9.95 (USD) FREE Domestic Premium Not available $9.95 (USD) Domestic Express $15 (USD) $15 (USD) US-Canada $15 (USD) $15 (USD) International $29 (USD) $29 (USD) Domestic: The seller and shipping address are in the same country US-Canada: The seller is in Canada and shipping address is in the US, or vice versa International: The seller and shipping address are in different countries, except between US and Canada.

tax.summary: All additional customs and import duties are the responsibility of the person purchasing.

fee.summary: SHIPPING FEES If your item total is $100 (USD) or more, we offer FREE shipping on all domestic (same country) shipments in your order.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
